```{r}
    fi_n_valid   = sum(!is.na(c_across(all_of(fi_items)))),
    fi_n_deficit = sum(c_across(all_of(fi_items)) == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    year = 2014L,
    fi_score = if_else(
      fi_n_valid >= ceiling(n_fi_items * 0.8),
      fi_n_deficit / fi_n_valid,
      NA_real_
    ),
    frailty = case_when(
      is.na(fi_score)   ~ NA_integer_,
      fi_score >= 0.25  ~ 1L,
      fi_score < 0.25   ~ 0L
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(fi_score)) %>%
  select(idauniq, year, fi_n_valid, fi_n_deficit, fi_score, frailty)


```



```{r}
# 5. Merge 2014 data
# ==========================================================================

elsa_2014 <- elsa_cov_2014 %>%
  left_join(sensory_var_2014, by = "idauniq") %>%
  left_join(elsa_cog_2014,    by = c("idauniq", "year")) %>%
  left_join(elsa_fi_2014,     by = c("idauniq", "year")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(dementia), !is.na(frailty))


# ==========================================================================
# 6. Multiple imputation
# Note: Education is all NA in W7, so exclude from imputation (same as W6)
# ==========================================================================

imp14_elsa <- elsa_2014 %>%
  mutate(idauniq = as.character(idauniq)) %>%
  transmute(
    idauniq,
    Gender,
    age_2014 = as.numeric(age_2014),
    Marital_status,
    Employment,
    Smoking,
    Alcohol,
    Physical_activity,
    Social_activity,
    frailty,
    dementia
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Gender = factor(Gender, levels = c(1, 2)),
    across(
      c(Marital_status, Employment, Smoking, Alcohol,
        Physical_activity, Social_activity, frailty, dementia),
      ~ factor(.x, levels = c(0, 1))
    )
  )

meth <- make.method(imp14_elsa)
meth[c("idauniq", "Gender", "dementia")] <- ""
meth["age_2014"] <- "pmm"
meth[c("Marital_status", "Employment", "Smoking", "Alcohol",
       "Physical_activity", "Social_activity", "frailty")] <- "logreg"

pred <- make.predictorMatrix(imp14_elsa)
pred[, "idauniq"] <- 0
pred["idauniq", ] <- 0

set.seed(3)
imp_mice14_elsa <- mice(
  imp14_elsa,
  m      = 20,
  maxit  = 10,
  method = meth,
  predictorMatrix = pred,
  printFlag = TRUE
)

imp14_elsa_complete1 <- complete(imp_mice14_elsa, 1)

imputed_vars_w7 <- c(
  "Marital_status", "Employment", "Smoking", "Alcohol",
  "Physical_activity", "Social_activity", "frailty", "age_2014"
)

elsa14_clean <- elsa_2014 %>%
  mutate(idauniq = as.character(idauniq)) %>%
  select(-all_of(imputed_vars_w7)) %>%
  left_join(
    imp14_elsa_complete1 %>%
      mutate(idauniq = as.character(idauniq)) %>%
      select(idauniq, all_of(imputed_vars_w7)),
    by = "idauniq"
  )


# ==========================================================================
# 7. Final merged dataset
# ==========================================================================

ELSA_2014 <- elsa14_clean %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(hearing_loss),
    !is.na(vision_overall),
    !(is.na(cataract_surgery) & is.na(glaucoma_treatment))
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    impaired_vision = pmax(
      coalesce(cataract_surgery, 0L),
      coalesce(glaucoma_treatment, 0L)
    )
  )

```






# ELSA Wave 8 (2016)
```{r}
# ELSA Wave 8 (2016)
# W8 notes:
#   - All lowercase variable names
#   - NO education variable
#   - Marital: dimarr (not dimar/DiMar) — simplified coding:
#     1=Single, 2=Married or CP (combined), 3=Remarried,
#     4=Separated/CP separated, 5=Divorced/CP dissolved,
#     6=Widowed/surviving CP
#   - Social: NEW variable names (scorgpo, scorgnw, scorgrl, scorgch,
#     scorged, scorgsc, scorgsp, scorg95, scorg96)
#   - headlph present (not headlte)
#   - IQCODE: lowercase heiqb-q
#   - All binary 0/1
# ==========================================================================

elsa_core_w8 <- read_dta(file.path(data_dir, "wave_8_elsa_data_eul_v2.dta"))

# ==========================================================================
# 1. Covariates
# ==========================================================================

elsa_cov_2016 <- elsa_core_w8 %>%
  transmute(
    idauniq,
    year = 2016L,
    birth_year = if_else(indobyr > 0, as.numeric(indobyr), NA_real_),
    age_2016   = if_else(indager > 0, as.numeric(indager), NA_real_),

    Gender = case_when(
      indsex %in% c(1, 2) ~ as.integer(indsex),
      TRUE                ~ NA_integer_
    ),

    # No education variable in W8
    Education = NA_integer_,

    # dimarr: simplified coding
    # 2=Married/CP, 3=Remarried → married (1)
    # 1=Single, 4=Separated, 5=Divorced, 6=Widowed → not married (0)
    Marital_status = case_when(
      dimarr %in% c(2, 3)       ~ 1L,
      dimarr %in% c(1, 4, 5, 6) ~ 0L,
      TRUE                      ~ NA_integer_
    ),

    Employment = case_when(
      wpdes %in% c(2, 3) ~ 1L,
      wpdes > 0           ~ 0L,
      TRUE                ~ NA_integer_
    ),

    Smoking = case_when(
      heska == 1 ~ 1L,
      heska == 2 ~ 0L,
      TRUE       ~ NA_integer_
    ),

    Alcohol = case_when(
      scal7a == 1 ~ 1L,
      scal7a == 2 ~ 0L,
      TRUE        ~ NA_integer_
    ),

    Physical_activity = case_when(
      heacta %in% c(1, 2, 3) ~ 1L,
      heacta == 4             ~ 0L,
      TRUE                   ~ NA_integer_
    ),

    # W8 social: new variable names
    # scorgpo=political, scorgnw=neighbourhood, scorgrl=religious,
    # scorgch=charitable, scorged=education, scorgsc=social club,
    # scorgsp=sports, scorg95=other, scorg96=none
    Social_activity = case_when(
      scorgpo == 1 | scorgnw == 1 | scorgrl == 1 | scorgch == 1 |
      scorged == 1 | scorgsc == 1 | scorgsp == 1 | scorg95 == 1 ~ 1L,
      scorg96 == 1 ~ 0L,
      scorgpo == 0 & scorgnw == 0 & scorgrl == 0 & scorgch == 0 &
      scorged == 0 & scorgsc == 0 & scorgsp == 0 & scorg95 == 0 ~ 0L,
      TRUE ~ NA_integer_
    )
  ) %>%
  select(
    idauniq, year, birth_year, age_2016,
    Gender, Education, Marital_status, Employment,
    Smoking, Alcohol, Physical_activity, Social_activity
  )


# ==========================================================================
# 2. Sensory variables
# ==========================================================================

sensory_var_2016 <- elsa_core_w8 %>%
  transmute(
    idauniq,

    hearing_loss = case_when(
      hehear %in% c(1, 2, 3) ~ 0L,
      hehear %in% c(4, 5)    ~ 1L,
      TRUE                   ~ NA_integer_
    ),

    vision_overall = case_when(
      heeye %in% c(1, 2, 3)    ~ 0L,
      heeye %in% c(4, 5, 6)    ~ 1L,
      TRUE                     ~ NA_integer_
    ),

    cataract_surgery = case_when(
      heoptca == 1 ~ 1L,
      heoptca == 0 ~ 0L,
      TRUE         ~ NA_integer_
    ),

    glaucoma_treatment = case_when(
      heoptgl == 1 ~ 1L,
      heoptgl == 0 ~ 0L,
      TRUE         ~ NA_integer_
    )
  ) %>%
  select(idauniq, hearing_loss, vision_overall,
         cataract_surgery, glaucoma_treatment)


# ==========================================================================
# 3. Dementia classification
# lowercase heiqb-q
# ==========================================================================

elsa_cog_2016 <- elsa_core_w8 %>%
  transmute(
    idauniq,
    year = 2016L,

    diagnosed_dementia = case_when(
      hedibad == 1 | hedibde == 1 ~ 1L,
      hedibad == 0 & hedibde == 0 ~ 0L,
      TRUE                       ~ NA_integer_
    ),

    iqcode_b = if_else(heiqb %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqb), NA_real_),
    iqcode_c = if_else(heiqc %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqc), NA_real_),
    iqcode_d = if_else(heiqd %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqd), NA_real_),
    iqcode_e = if_else(heiqe %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqe), NA_real_),
    iqcode_f = if_else(heiqf %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqf), NA_real_),
    iqcode_g = if_else(heiqg %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqg), NA_real_),
    iqcode_h = if_else(heiqh %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqh), NA_real_),
    iqcode_i = if_else(heiqi %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqi), NA_real_),
    iqcode_j = if_else(heiqj %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqj), NA_real_),
    iqcode_k = if_else(heiqk %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqk), NA_real_),
    iqcode_l = if_else(heiql %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiql), NA_real_),
    iqcode_m = if_else(heiqm %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqm), NA_real_),
    iqcode_n = if_else(heiqn %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqn), NA_real_),
    iqcode_o = if_else(heiqo %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqo), NA_real_),
    iqcode_p = if_else(heiqp %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqp), NA_real_),
    iqcode_q = if_else(heiqq %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqq), NA_real_)
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    iqcode_n_valid = sum(!is.na(c_across(iqcode_b:iqcode_q))),
    iqcode_mean    = if_else(
      iqcode_n_valid >= 1,
      mean(c_across(iqcode_b:iqcode_q), na.rm = TRUE),
      NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    iqcode_dementia = case_when(
      is.na(iqcode_mean)  ~ NA_integer_,
      iqcode_mean >= 3.4  ~ 1L,
      iqcode_mean < 3.4   ~ 0L
    ),

    dementia = case_when(
      diagnosed_dementia == 1 | iqcode_dementia == 1 ~ 1L,
      diagnosed_dementia == 0 | iqcode_dementia == 0 ~ 0L,
      TRUE                                          ~ NA_integer_
    )
  ) %>%
  select(idauniq, year, diagnosed_dementia, iqcode_mean, iqcode_dementia, dementia)

```




```{r}
# 4. Frailty Index (49 items)
# W8: lowercase, headlph present, hehelf Excellent scale, binary 0/1
# ==========================================================================

recode_mob_adl_w8 <- function(x) {
  case_when(
    x == 1  ~ 1L,
    x == 0  ~ 0L,
    TRUE    ~ NA_integer_
  )
}

recode_dx_w8 <- function(x) {
  case_when(
    x == 1  ~ 1L,
    x == 0  ~ 0L,
    TRUE    ~ NA_integer_
  )
}

# Mobility (Items 1-10)
mobility_w8 <- elsa_core_w8 %>%
  select(idauniq, hemobwa, hemobsi, hemobch, hemobcs, hemobcl,
         hemobst, hemobre, hemobpu, hemobli, hemobpi) %>%
  mutate(across(-idauniq, recode_mob_adl_w8))

# ADL/IADL (Items 11-23)
# W8: headlph present, headlho → headlhg
adl_iadl_w8 <- elsa_core_w8 %>%
  select(idauniq, headldr, headlwa, headlba, headlea, headlbe, headlwc,
         headlma, headlpr, headlsh, headlph, headlme, headlho, headlmo) %>%
  rename(headlhg = headlho) %>%
  mutate(across(-idauniq, recode_mob_adl_w8))

# Diagnosed conditions (Items 24-36) — binary 0/1
diagnoses_w8 <- elsa_core_w8 %>%
  select(idauniq, hedimbp, hediman, hedimmi, hedimhf, hedimar,
         hedimdi, hedimst, hediblu, hedibas, hedibar, hedibos,
         hedibca, hedibps) %>%
  mutate(across(-idauniq, recode_dx_w8))

# CES-D (Items 37-44) — lowercase
cesd_w8 <- elsa_core_w8 %>%
  select(idauniq, psceda, pscedb, pscedc, pscedd,
         pscede, pscedf, pscedg, pscedh) %>%
  mutate(
    # Standard items: 1(Yes) = deficit
    psceda = case_when(psceda == 1 ~ 1L, psceda == 2 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
    pscedb = case_when(pscedb == 1 ~ 1L, pscedb == 2 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
    pscedc = case_when(pscedc == 1 ~ 1L, pscedc == 2 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
    pscede = case_when(pscede == 1 ~ 1L, pscede == 2 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
    pscedg = case_when(pscedg == 1 ~ 1L, pscedg == 2 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
    pscedh = case_when(pscedh == 1 ~ 1L, pscedh == 2 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
    # Reverse-coded: 2(No) = deficit
    pscedd = case_when(pscedd == 2 ~ 1L, pscedd == 1 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
    pscedf = case_when(pscedf == 2 ~ 1L, pscedf == 1 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_)
  )

# Other health (Items 45, 48-51)
# hehelf: Excellent scale → 1,2,3→0; 4,5→1
other_health_w8 <- elsa_core_w8 %>%
  select(idauniq, hehelf, hefla, hefrac, heji, mmpain) %>%
  mutate(
    hehelf = case_when(
      hehelf %in% c(1, 2, 3) ~ 0L,
      hehelf %in% c(4, 5)    ~ 1L,
      TRUE                   ~ NA_integer_
    ),
    hefla  = case_when(hefla  == 1 ~ 1L, hefla  == 2 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
    hefrac = case_when(hefrac == 1 ~ 1L, hefrac == 2 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
    heji   = case_when(heji   == 1 ~ 1L, heji   == 2 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
    mmpain = case_when(mmpain == 1 ~ 1L, mmpain == 2 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_)
  ) %>%
  select(idauniq, hehelf, hefla, hefrac, heji, mmpain)

# Merge and compute FI
elsa_fi_2016 <- mobility_w8 %>%
  left_join(adl_iadl_w8,     by = "idauniq") %>%
  left_join(diagnoses_w8,    by = "idauniq") %>%
  left_join(cesd_w8,         by = "idauniq") %>%
  left_join(other_health_w8, by = "idauniq") %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    fi_n_valid   = sum(!is.na(c_across(all_of(fi_items)))),
    fi_n_deficit = sum(c_across(all_of(fi_items)) == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    year = 2016L,
    fi_score = if_else(
      fi_n_valid >= ceiling(n_fi_items * 0.8),
      fi_n_deficit / fi_n_valid,
      NA_real_
    ),
    frailty = case_when(
      is.na(fi_score)   ~ NA_integer_,
      fi_score >= 0.25  ~ 1L,
      fi_score < 0.25   ~ 0L
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(fi_score)) %>%
  select(idauniq, year, fi_n_valid, fi_n_deficit, fi_score, frailty)

```




```{r}
# 5. Merge 2016 data
# ==========================================================================

elsa_2016 <- elsa_cov_2016 %>%
  left_join(sensory_var_2016, by = "idauniq") %>%
  left_join(elsa_cog_2016,    by = c("idauniq", "year")) %>%
  left_join(elsa_fi_2016,     by = c("idauniq", "year")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(dementia), !is.na(frailty))


# ==========================================================================
# 6. Multiple imputation
# Note: No Education in W8, exclude from imputation
# ==========================================================================

imp16_elsa <- elsa_2016 %>%
  mutate(idauniq = as.character(idauniq)) %>%
  transmute(
    idauniq,
    Gender,
    age_2016 = as.numeric(age_2016),
    Marital_status,
    Employment,
    Smoking,
    Alcohol,
    Physical_activity,
    Social_activity,
    frailty,
    dementia
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Gender = factor(Gender, levels = c(1, 2)),
    across(
      c(Marital_status, Employment, Smoking, Alcohol,
        Physical_activity, Social_activity, frailty, dementia),
      ~ factor(.x, levels = c(0, 1))
    )
  )

meth <- make.method(imp16_elsa)
meth[c("idauniq", "Gender", "dementia")] <- ""
meth["age_2016"] <- "pmm"
meth[c("Marital_status", "Employment", "Smoking", "Alcohol",
       "Physical_activity", "Social_activity", "frailty")] <- "logreg"

pred <- make.predictorMatrix(imp16_elsa)
pred[, "idauniq"] <- 0
pred["idauniq", ] <- 0

set.seed(3)
imp_mice16_elsa <- mice(
  imp16_elsa,
  m      = 20,
  maxit  = 10,
  method = meth,
  predictorMatrix = pred,
  printFlag = TRUE
)

imp16_elsa_complete1 <- complete(imp_mice16_elsa, 1)

imputed_vars_w8 <- c(
  "Marital_status", "Employment", "Smoking", "Alcohol",
  "Physical_activity", "Social_activity", "frailty", "age_2016"
)

elsa16_clean <- elsa_2016 %>%
  mutate(idauniq = as.character(idauniq)) %>%
  select(-all_of(imputed_vars_w8)) %>%
  left_join(
    imp16_elsa_complete1 %>%
      mutate(idauniq = as.character(idauniq)) %>%
      select(idauniq, all_of(imputed_vars_w8)),
    by = "idauniq"
  )


# ==========================================================================
# 7. Final merged dataset
# ==========================================================================

ELSA_2016 <- elsa16_clean %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(hearing_loss),
    !is.na(vision_overall),
    !(is.na(cataract_surgery) & is.na(glaucoma_treatment))
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    impaired_vision = pmax(
      coalesce(cataract_surgery, 0L),
      coalesce(glaucoma_treatment, 0L)
    )
  )

```






# ELSA Wave 9 (2018)
```{r}
# ELSA Wave 9 (2018)
# W9 notes:
#   - Same structure as W8: all lowercase, no education, dimarr
#   - Alcohol: scal7a GONE → scalcy (same 1=Yes/2=No coding)
#   - Social: same new names as W8 (scorgpo, scorgnw, etc.)
#   - Everything else identical to W8
# ==========================================================================

elsa_core_w9 <- read_dta(file.path(data_dir, "wave_9_elsa_data_eul_v2.dta"))

# ==========================================================================
# 1. Covariates
# ==========================================================================

elsa_cov_2018 <- elsa_core_w9 %>%
  transmute(
    idauniq,
    year = 2018L,
    birth_year = if_else(indobyr > 0, as.numeric(indobyr), NA_real_),
    age_2018   = if_else(indager > 0, as.numeric(indager), NA_real_),

    Gender = case_when(
      indsex %in% c(1, 2) ~ as.integer(indsex),
      TRUE                ~ NA_integer_
    ),

    # No education variable in W9
    Education = NA_integer_,

    # dimarr: simplified coding (same as W8)
    # 2=Married/CP, 3=Remarried → married (1)
    # 1=Single, 4=Separated, 5=Divorced, 6=Widowed → not married (0)
    Marital_status = case_when(
      dimarr %in% c(2, 3)       ~ 1L,
      dimarr %in% c(1, 4, 5, 6) ~ 0L,
      TRUE                      ~ NA_integer_
    ),

    Employment = case_when(
      wpdes %in% c(2, 3) ~ 1L,
      wpdes > 0           ~ 0L,
      TRUE                ~ NA_integer_
    ),

    Smoking = case_when(
      heska == 1 ~ 1L,
      heska == 2 ~ 0L,
      TRUE       ~ NA_integer_
    ),

    # W9: scalcy replaces scal7a (same 1=Yes/2=No coding)
    Alcohol = case_when(
      scalcy == 1 ~ 1L,
      scalcy == 2 ~ 0L,
      TRUE        ~ NA_integer_
    ),

    Physical_activity = case_when(
      heacta %in% c(1, 2, 3) ~ 1L,
      heacta == 4             ~ 0L,
      TRUE                   ~ NA_integer_
    ),

    # W9 social: same new names as W8
    Social_activity = case_when(
      scorgpo == 1 | scorgnw == 1 | scorgrl == 1 | scorgch == 1 |
      scorged == 1 | scorgsc == 1 | scorgsp == 1 | scorg95 == 1 ~ 1L,
      scorg96 == 1 ~ 0L,
      scorgpo == 0 & scorgnw == 0 & scorgrl == 0 & scorgch == 0 &
      scorged == 0 & scorgsc == 0 & scorgsp == 0 & scorg95 == 0 ~ 0L,
      TRUE ~ NA_integer_
    )
  ) %>%
  select(
    idauniq, year, birth_year, age_2018,
    Gender, Education, Marital_status, Employment,
    Smoking, Alcohol, Physical_activity, Social_activity
  )


# ==========================================================================
# 2. Sensory variables
# ==========================================================================

sensory_var_2018 <- elsa_core_w9 %>%
  transmute(
    idauniq,

    hearing_loss = case_when(
      hehear %in% c(1, 2, 3) ~ 0L,
      hehear %in% c(4, 5)    ~ 1L,
      TRUE                   ~ NA_integer_
    ),

    vision_overall = case_when(
      heeye %in% c(1, 2, 3)    ~ 0L,
      heeye %in% c(4, 5, 6)    ~ 1L,
      TRUE                     ~ NA_integer_
    ),

    cataract_surgery = case_when(
      heoptca == 1 ~ 1L,
      heoptca == 0 ~ 0L,
      TRUE         ~ NA_integer_
    ),

    glaucoma_treatment = case_when(
      heoptgl == 1 ~ 1L,
      heoptgl == 0 ~ 0L,
      TRUE         ~ NA_integer_
    )
  ) %>%
  select(idauniq, hearing_loss, vision_overall,
         cataract_surgery, glaucoma_treatment)


# ==========================================================================
# 3. Dementia classification
# ==========================================================================

elsa_cog_2018 <- elsa_core_w9 %>%
  transmute(
    idauniq,
    year = 2018L,

    diagnosed_dementia = case_when(
      hedibad == 1 | hedibde == 1 ~ 1L,
      hedibad == 0 & hedibde == 0 ~ 0L,
      TRUE                       ~ NA_integer_
    ),

    iqcode_b = if_else(heiqb %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqb), NA_real_),
    iqcode_c = if_else(heiqc %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqc), NA_real_),
    iqcode_d = if_else(heiqd %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqd), NA_real_),
    iqcode_e = if_else(heiqe %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqe), NA_real_),
    iqcode_f = if_else(heiqf %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqf), NA_real_),
    iqcode_g = if_else(heiqg %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqg), NA_real_),
    iqcode_h = if_else(heiqh %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqh), NA_real_),
    iqcode_i = if_else(heiqi %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqi), NA_real_),
    iqcode_j = if_else(heiqj %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqj), NA_real_),
    iqcode_k = if_else(heiqk %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqk), NA_real_),
    iqcode_l = if_else(heiql %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiql), NA_real_),
    iqcode_m = if_else(heiqm %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqm), NA_real_),
    iqcode_n = if_else(heiqn %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqn), NA_real_),
    iqcode_o = if_else(heiqo %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqo), NA_real_),
    iqcode_p = if_else(heiqp %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqp), NA_real_),
    iqcode_q = if_else(heiqq %in% 1:5, as.numeric(heiqq), NA_real_)
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    iqcode_n_valid = sum(!is.na(c_across(iqcode_b:iqcode_q))),
    iqcode_mean    = if_else(
      iqcode_n_valid >= 1,
      mean(c_across(iqcode_b:iqcode_q), na.rm = TRUE),
      NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    iqcode_dementia = case_when(
      is.na(iqcode_mean)  ~ NA_integer_,
      iqcode_mean >= 3.4  ~ 1L,
      iqcode_mean < 3.4   ~ 0L
    ),

    dementia = case_when(
      diagnosed_dementia == 1 | iqcode_dementia == 1 ~ 1L,
      diagnosed_dementia == 0 | iqcode_dementia == 0 ~ 0L,
      TRUE                                          ~ NA_integer_
    )
  ) %>%
  select(idauniq, year, diagnosed_dementia, iqcode_mean, iqcode_dementia, dementia)


```


# Frailty Index 2018-2019
```{r}
# 4. Frailty Index (49 items)
# Same as W8: lowercase, headlph, hehelf Excellent scale, binary 0/1
# ==========================================================================

recode_mob_adl_w9 <- function(x) {
  case_when(
    x == 1  ~ 1L,
    x == 0  ~ 0L,
    TRUE    ~ NA_integer_
  )
}

recode_dx_w9 <- function(x) {
  case_when(
    x == 1  ~ 1L,
    x == 0  ~ 0L,
    TRUE    ~ NA_integer_
  )
}

# Mobility (Items 1-10)
mobility_w9 <- elsa_core_w9 %>%
  select(idauniq, hemobwa, hemobsi, hemobch, hemobcs, hemobcl,
         hemobst, hemobre, hemobpu, hemobli, hemobpi) %>%
  mutate(across(-idauniq, recode_mob_adl_w9))

# ADL/IADL (Items 11-23)
# headlph present, headlho → headlhg
adl_iadl_w9 <- elsa_core_w9 %>%
  select(idauniq, headldr, headlwa, headlba, headlea, headlbe, headlwc,
         headlma, headlpr, headlsh, headlph, headlme, headlho, headlmo) %>%
  rename(headlhg = headlho) %>%
  mutate(across(-idauniq, recode_mob_adl_w9))

# Diagnosed conditions (Items 24-36) — binary 0/1
diagnoses_w9 <- elsa_core_w9 %>%
  select(idauniq, hedimbp, hediman, hedimmi, hedimhf, hedimar,
         hedimdi, hedimst, hediblu, hedibas, hedibar, hedibos,
         hedibca, hedibps) %>%
  mutate(across(-idauniq, recode_dx_w9))

# CES-D (Items 37-44) — lowercase
cesd_w9 <- elsa_core_w9 %>%
  select(idauniq, psceda, pscedb, pscedc, pscedd,
         pscede, pscedf, pscedg, pscedh) %>%
  mutate(
    # Standard items: 1(Yes) = deficit
    psceda = case_when(psceda == 1 ~ 1L, psceda == 2 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
    pscedb = case_when(pscedb == 1 ~ 1L, pscedb == 2 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
    pscedc = case_when(pscedc == 1 ~ 1L, pscedc == 2 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
    pscede = case_when(pscede == 1 ~ 1L, pscede == 2 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
    pscedg = case_when(pscedg == 1 ~ 1L, pscedg == 2 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
    pscedh = case_when(pscedh == 1 ~ 1L, pscedh == 2 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
    # Reverse-coded: 2(No) = deficit
    pscedd = case_when(pscedd == 2 ~ 1L, pscedd == 1 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
    pscedf = case_when(pscedf == 2 ~ 1L, pscedf == 1 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_)
  )

# Other health (Items 45, 48-51)
# hehelf: Excellent scale → 1,2,3→0; 4,5→1
other_health_w9 <- elsa_core_w9 %>%
  select(idauniq, hehelf, hefla, hefrac, heji, mmpain) %>%
  mutate(
    hehelf = case_when(
      hehelf %in% c(1, 2, 3) ~ 0L,
      hehelf %in% c(4, 5)    ~ 1L,
      TRUE                   ~ NA_integer_
    ),
    hefla  = case_when(hefla  == 1 ~ 1L, hefla  == 2 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
    hefrac = case_when(hefrac == 1 ~ 1L, hefrac == 2 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
    heji   = case_when(heji   == 1 ~ 1L, heji   == 2 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
    mmpain = case_when(mmpain == 1 ~ 1L, mmpain == 2 ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_)
  ) %>%
  select(idauniq, hehelf, hefla, hefrac, heji, mmpain)

# Merge and compute FI
elsa_fi_2018 <- mobility_w9 %>%
  left_join(adl_iadl_w9,     by = "idauniq") %>%
  left_join(diagnoses_w9,    by = "idauniq") %>%
  left_join(cesd_w9,         by = "idauniq") %>%
  left_join(other_health_w9, by = "idauniq") %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    fi_n_valid   = sum(!is.na(c_across(all_of(fi_items)))),
    fi_n_deficit = sum(c_across(all_of(fi_items)) == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    year = 2018L,
    fi_score = if_else(
      fi_n_valid >= ceiling(n_fi_items * 0.8),
      fi_n_deficit / fi_n_valid,
      NA_real_
    ),
    frailty = case_when(
      is.na(fi_score)   ~ NA_integer_,
      fi_score >= 0.25  ~ 1L,
      fi_score < 0.25   ~ 0L
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(fi_score)) %>%
  select(idauniq, year, fi_n_valid, fi_n_deficit, fi_score, frailty)


```




```{r}
# 5. Merge 2018 data
# ==========================================================================

elsa_2018 <- elsa_cov_2018 %>%
  left_join(sensory_var_2018, by = "idauniq") %>%
  left_join(elsa_cog_2018,    by = c("idauniq", "year")) %>%
  left_join(elsa_fi_2018,     by = c("idauniq", "year")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(dementia), !is.na(frailty))


# ==========================================================================
# 6. Multiple imputation
# Note: No Education in W9, exclude from imputation
# ==========================================================================

imp18_elsa <- elsa_2018 %>%
  mutate(idauniq = as.character(idauniq)) %>%
  transmute(
    idauniq,
    Gender,
    age_2018 = as.numeric(age_2018),
    Marital_status,
    Employment,
    Smoking,
    Alcohol,
    Physical_activity,
    Social_activity,
    frailty,
    dementia
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Gender = factor(Gender, levels = c(1, 2)),
    across(
      c(Marital_status, Employment, Smoking, Alcohol,
        Physical_activity, Social_activity, frailty, dementia),
      ~ factor(.x, levels = c(0, 1))
    )
  )

meth <- make.method(imp18_elsa)
meth[c("idauniq", "Gender", "dementia")] <- ""
meth["age_2018"] <- "pmm"
meth[c("Marital_status", "Employment", "Smoking", "Alcohol",
       "Physical_activity", "Social_activity", "frailty")] <- "logreg"

pred <- make.predictorMatrix(imp18_elsa)
pred[, "idauniq"] <- 0
pred["idauniq", ] <- 0

set.seed(3)
imp_mice18_elsa <- mice(
  imp18_elsa,
  m      = 20,
  maxit  = 10,
  method = meth,
  predictorMatrix = pred,
  printFlag = TRUE
)

imp18_elsa_complete1 <- complete(imp_mice18_elsa, 1)

imputed_vars_w9 <- c(
  "Marital_status", "Employment", "Smoking", "Alcohol",
  "Physical_activity", "Social_activity", "frailty", "age_2018"
)

elsa18_clean <- elsa_2018 %>%
  mutate(idauniq = as.character(idauniq)) %>%
  select(-all_of(imputed_vars_w9)) %>%
  left_join(
    imp18_elsa_complete1 %>%
      mutate(idauniq = as.character(idauniq)) %>%
      select(idauniq, all_of(imputed_vars_w9)),
    by = "idauniq"
  )


# ==========================================================================
# 7. Final merged dataset
# ==========================================================================

ELSA_2018 <- elsa18_clean %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(hearing_loss),
    !is.na(vision_overall),
    !(is.na(cataract_surgery) & is.na(glaucoma_treatment))
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    impaired_vision = pmax(
      coalesce(cataract_surgery, 0L),
      coalesce(glaucoma_treatment, 0L)
    )
  )

```




```{r}
# Merge all waves into longitudinal datasets
# Put wave datasets into a list
dat_list <- list(
  elsa04 = ELSA_2004 %>% mutate(Education = as.integer(Education)),
  elsa06 = ELSA_2006 %>% mutate(Education = as.integer(Education)),
  elsa08 = ELSA_2008 %>% mutate(Education = as.integer(Education)),
  elsa10 = ELSA_2010 %>% mutate(Education = as.integer(Education)),
  elsa12 = ELSA_2012,
  elsa14 = ELSA_2014,
  elsa16 = ELSA_2016,
  elsa18 = ELSA_2018
)

elsa_long <- bind_rows(dat_list, .id = "source") %>%
  mutate(
    idauniq = as.character(idauniq),
    year    = as.integer(year)
  )

elsa_long <- elsa_long %>%
  mutate(
    age = coalesce(age_2004, age_2006, age_2008, age_2010,
                   age_2012, age_2014, age_2016, age_2018)
  ) %>%
  select(-matches("^age_\\d{4}$"))

write.csv(elsa_long,
          file = "elsa_long.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```
